content:
### 最新の関連Xポスト（2026年4月時点、S&P500 tariff recession risk 2026関連）

以下は、キーワード「S&P500 tariff recession risk 2026」にセマンティック検索でヒットした最新の関連ポストです。タイムスタンプの新しい順に本文（Content）とURLを記載。エンゲージメントの高いものを優先。

1. **2026-04-07** (最も最新)  
   **本文**: S&P 500 down 4.6% YTD. Oil up 66%. Tariffs at 12%. Fed frozen. Most dangerous macro cocktail since 2008. And retail is still holding meme stocks. Good luck out there.  
   **URL**: https://x.com/GiuliaTrades/status/2041364592505557424  
   **著者**: @GiuliaTrades

2. **2026-04-06**  
   **本文**: Here's what the numbers look like right now: S&P 500 year-end target: cut from 7,600 to 7,300 CPI forecast for 2026: revised UP to 3.8% GDP growth: trimmed to 2.0% Average tariff cost per US household: $1,500 this year Passive investors are just absorbing all of this. AI-assisted ones are adapting. There's a difference.  
   **URL**: https://x.com/TheWealtharian/status/2041164992439779786  
   **著者**: @TheWealtharian

3. **2026-04-04**  
   **本文**: Trump privatizing TSA is exactly the kind of policy shock that moves macro markets. @Polymarket currently prices 35% odds of a US recession by end of 2026 — backed by $1M in bets. Every DOGE-style cut adds fuel to that number. https://polymarket.com/event/us-recession-by-end-of-2026  
   **URL**: https://x.com/USPredict/status/2040438896614379731  
   **著者**: @USPredict

4. **2026-03-31**  
   **本文**: 62.5% of geopolitical corrections produce a V-shaped recovery. Bottom to new highs in under 6 months. 1990 Gulf War. COVID 2020. April 2025 tariffs. The #1 factor? Whether it tips into recession. Without recession, markets recover. Every time. Recession odds: Moody's 49%. Goldman 30%. Not at 70-80% where bear markets become inevitable. The setup is forming underneath the fear.  
   **URL**: https://x.com/alexkoh/status/2039025452162179299  
   **著者**: @alexkoh

5. **2026-03-29**  
   **本文**: 2008 GFC Crash: ▫️ S&P 500 dumped 20%, then pumped 14% before another 53% drop. 2020 Covid Crash: ▫️ $SPX dumped 15%, then pumped 9% before another 30% drop. 2025 Tariffs Crash: ▫️ SPX dumped 10%, then pumped 5% before another 16% drop. 2026 Dump: ▫️ SPX has dropped 9% and could drop a bit more. After that a relief rally will happen, followed by another leg down.  
   **URL**: https://x.com/TedPillows/status/2038196970393846129  
   **著者**: @TedPillows

これらはtariffによるS&P500の下落、リセッション確率（30-49%）、2026年予測を中心に議論。キーワード検索では直接ヒットなしでしたが、セマンティックで関連性高いものを抽出。追加情報が必要なら指定ください。
